name: ARK RESTAURANTS CORP
business: ARK Restaurants Corp. owns and operates a portfolio of restaurants, bars, fast food concepts, and catering operations across the United States. The company generates revenue primarily from food and beverage sales at its properties. Its restaurants are destination venues located in major cities and tourist destinations.

exposures.sentence: Since March 12, 2013, the Company has made investments in the New Meadowlands Racetrack LLC (NMR) through its purchase of membership interests in Meadowlands Newmark, LLC, an existing member of NMR.
As of the fiscal year ended September 27, 2025, we owned and/or operated 16 restaurants and bars, 12 fast food concepts and catering operations through our subsidiaries.

catalysts.event: Refresh of America at New York-New York Hotel and Casino completion deadline
catalysts.sentence: In connection with the extension, the Company has agreed to spend a minimum of $4,000,000 to materially refresh the premises by March 31, 2026, as extended, subject to further extensions as set out in the agreement.

catalysts.event: Refresh of Village Eateries, Broadway Burger Bar and Grill, and Gonzalez y Gonzalez completion deadline
catalysts.sentence: In connection with the extension, the Company has agreed to spend a minimum of $3,500,000 to materially refresh all three of these premises by December 31, 2025, as extended.

catalysts.event: Potential ballot referendum for casino licenses at Monmouth Park and Meadowlands Racetrack
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, a Senate Concurrent Resolution was introduced proposing a ballot referendum to authorize casinos at both the Monmouth Park and Meadowlands Racetracks.
